_note: This is an example of what a mature, tuned system produces. Your first few runs will have more noise and fewer patterns as you tune keywords and filters.

strategic_signals.title: Competitor Alpha restructures pricing — drops per-seat model for usage-based tiers
strategic_signals.analysis: This is a significant GTM shift. Usage-based pricing lowers the barrier to entry for smaller organizations — exactly our sweet spot. If their entry tier undercuts our starter plan, we may see increased competition in the SMB segment. Worth monitoring their landing page for specific price points.

strategic_signals.title: Competitor Gamma announces strategic partnership with Big Four consulting firm
strategic_signals.analysis: Channel partnerships with consulting firms accelerate enterprise deals. This gives Competitor Gamma warm introductions into exactly the mid-market accounts we're targeting. Their product-plus-services bundle could be compelling for risk-averse buyers who want implementation support.

notable_changes.title: New English-language version of website launched
notable_changes.context: Previously domestic-only website. Signals international expansion intent — entering our addressable market.

notable_changes.title: Hiring 3 SDRs in EMEA region (LinkedIn job posts)
notable_changes.context: Outbound sales push in our primary market. Previously relied on inbound/partner channel.

notable_changes.title: Added automated workflow builder to product changelog
notable_changes.context: Closing a gap that was previously a differentiator for us. Feature parity risk in the automation space.

notable_changes.title: New case study published featuring Fortune 500 customer
notable_changes.context: Signaling enterprise-readiness. Not our ICP segment directly, but establishes credibility that influences mid-market buyers.

regulatory_market.title: New data protection regulation enforcement deadline confirmed for Q3 2025
regulatory_market.summary: Multiple jurisdictions confirmed implementation timelines. Creates urgency for organizations in scope — potential demand driver for compliance tools.

regulatory_market.title: AI Act compliance requirements finalized — enterprise software impact assessment due
regulatory_market.summary: Regulation now enforceable. Organizations using AI in decision-making need documented compliance. Creates demand for audit and governance tooling.

background.title: Competitor Zeta mentioned in Gartner market guide for [industry] platforms
2 new G2 reviews (4.2 avg rating, no notable themes)
Blog post: '5 Steps to Better Team Collaboration' — routine content, no product announcements

patterns: Competitor Alpha is on an aggressive GTM trajectory: pricing restructure + regional hiring + increased content velocity. Third consecutive period with strategic-level signals.
Industry-wide movement toward usage-based pricing — Competitor Alpha and Competitor Epsilon both shifted away from per-seat models this quarter.
Regulatory pressure creating visible demand signals across multiple competitors' content strategies.
